title: Goal-mode runner v0
description: Build .harness/bin/goal_mode.py: `--cmd '<test command>' --max-iters N` runs the command, and on failure writes a structured digest (.harness/logs/goal_mode_last_failure.md: exit code, tail of stderr/stdout, suspected files) then exits nonzero so the calling agent iterates; on success exits 0 and logs a goal_reached event. Bounded by state.json limits. ZCode parity item #1.
acceptance_criteria: iterations strictly bounded; never loops forever
failure digest is actionable (names the failing command and captures stderr tail)
